description_long: This shotgun features a distinctive, organic design with a curved, reptilian-like body covered in a textured green and yellow pattern, resembling scales. The barrel is short and cylindrical, with a prominent circular opening at the front and a visible eye-like detail on the side, giving it a stylized, animalistic appearance. The body curves downward and backward, ending in a rounded, blunt tail, and the surface is adorned with subtle, dark, jagged markings along the top. The overall form is compact and ergonomic, lacking a traditional stock or fore-end, and the trigger area is not clearly defined. The finish appears matte with a slightly rough, grippy texture, and the object is constructed to look solid and robust. This shotgun would stand out in an urban environment due to its unique, almost creature-like aesthetic.
description: A compact, curved shotgun with a reptilian, scale-textured green and yellow body, featuring an eye-like detail and a short barrel. Its organic, animal-inspired design is visually striking and unconventional.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular barrel opening and the symmetrical, rounded snout-like front.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the curved, scale-textured body, the eye-like detail, and the jagged markings along the top.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the length of the curved body and the smooth, rounded tail end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the left, showing the same curved form, scale texture, and eye-like feature.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
